line_description: Empty line consisting only of two thin horizontal border lines (top and bottom) with no visible content, glyphs, or text between them.

graphics.description: Thin horizontal border line at the top of the line, spanning nearly the full width.
Thin horizontal border line at the bottom of the line, spanning nearly the full width.

schmeh_hint: Line 18: unknown -> around the warning line and the comma in the second line).
